name: Standard Meeting Notes
description: Clean meeting notes with an executive summary, topic-based key points, and optional takeaways.

sections.title: Executive Summary
sections.instruction: Briefly explain what the meeting was about and the main takeaway. Keep this proportional to the source material: short meetings should have a short summary.

sections.title: Key Topics
sections.instruction: Segment the transcript and user notes by topic. Use specific topic headings based on the source material. Under each topic, include concise but complete bullet points. Merge related transcript content and user notes under the same topic. If user notes do not fit a spoken topic, create a concise topic for those notes inside this section. Do not create a separate user notes, context, or observations section. Do not turn every transcript sentence into its own bullet. Do not repeat the same idea across multiple topics.

sections.title: Key Takeaways
sections.instruction: Include only meaningful takeaways that are explicitly supported by the transcript or user notes. Do not invent takeaways. If there are no clear key takeaways, omit this section entirely.
